sections.title: Chief Complaint
sections.description: Primary presenting complaint in the patient's own words

sections.title: History of Present Illness
sections.description: Onset, duration, character, radiation, associated symptoms, timing, exacerbating/relieving factors, severity

sections.title: Wound Assessment
sections.description: Wound dimensions, wound bed quality, wound edges, surrounding tissue, drainage, signs of infection, healing progress

sections.title: Imaging Review
sections.description: Description of imaging findings as literally observed on screen — modality, laterality, findings described only

sections.title: Assessment
sections.description: Clinical assessment as stated by the physician — diagnosis or working diagnosis explicitly stated

sections.title: Plan
sections.description: Treatment plan, investigations ordered, referrals, follow-up timeline as stated by the physician
